name: San Jose State University

additional_materials: Supplemental criteria form required for impacted (oversubscribed) majors

special_considerations: CSU system campus — uses Cal State Apply, not Common App; test scores not used for any admission decision (system-wide policy since 2022)
Many programs are 'impacted' (engineering, CS, business, nursing) and require meeting supplemental criteria beyond the campus-wide GPA floor
Local area and service area preference given to applicants from surrounding high schools when a major is impacted
Silicon Valley location drives strong industry ties; co-op programs and proximity to tech employers are major draws

financial_aid.notes: Cal Grant covers most tuition for eligible CA residents (~$7,400/yr in-state tuition). Aid is primarily need-based through state and federal programs.
